parameters.query:
SELECT id, url, brand, model,
  COALESCE(image_url, '') AS image_url,
  COALESCE(power_cv, 0)::int AS power_cv,
  COALESCE(body_type, '') AS body_type,
  COALESCE(color, '') AS color,
  COALESCE(city, '') AS city,
  COALESCE(location, '') AS location,
  COALESCE(fuel, '') AS fuel,
  COALESCE(transmission, '') AS transmission,
  COALESCE(environmental_label, '') AS environmental_label,
  COALESCE(doors, 0)::int AS doors,
  COALESCE(seats, 0)::int AS seats,
  COALESCE(displacement, '') AS displacement,
  COALESCE(co2, '') AS co2,
  COALESCE(consumption, 0) AS consumption,
  COALESCE(traction, '') AS traction,
  COALESCE(warranty_months, 0)::int AS warranty_months
FROM moveadvisor_market_offers
WHERE portal = 'autohero'
  AND (
    COALESCE(image_url, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(power_cv, 0) = 0
    OR COALESCE(body_type, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(color, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(location, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(fuel, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(transmission, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(environmental_label, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(doors, 0) = 0
    OR COALESCE(seats, 0) = 0
    OR COALESCE(displacement, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(co2, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(consumption, 0) = 0
    OR COALESCE(traction, '') = ''
    OR COALESCE(warranty_months, 0) = 0
  )
ORDER BY first_seen_at DESC
LIMIT 500
